subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath drunk from the Kawthar of utterance from the hands of bounty of his Lord, the All-Merciful, and was numbered among [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن شرب کوثر البیان من ایادی عطاء ربه الرحمن و کان من
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment
